data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Systems equipped with AI-driven threat detection to identify and mitigate potential risks.

data.title: Secure Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data at rest and during transmission to protect sensitive information.

data.title: Comprehensive Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.

data.title: Access Management
data.description: Strict identity verification and access controls to limit unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Implements SSO and MFA for user authentication.

data.title: Incident Response Procedures
data.description: Established protocols for responding to security incidents and breaches.
data.technical_spec: Incident response team active 24/7 with defined escalation procedures.
